info.title: Invoice4U API
info.description:
The Invoice4U API lets you create tax-compliant documents (invoices, receipts, credit invoices and more), manage customers and branches, and charge credit cards through the Invoice4U clearing service.

All endpoints are POST with a JSON body that wraps the operation parameters by name (WCF wrapped-request style). Responses wrap the result in a `<Operation>Result` property. Most endpoints require a `token` obtained from a login endpoint.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Create and retrieve documents (invoices, receipts, etc.).

tags.name: Clearing
tags.description: Credit-card charges, tokens, standing orders and clearing logs.

post.summary: Verify a token or API key
post.description: Validates an organization API key (GUID) or token and returns the resolved user. An account expired more than 4 days ago adds an `ExpiredAccount` error.

200.description: Resolved user, or a user object whose Errors array is populated when the token/key is invalid or the account is expired.

post.description: Creates a customer in the authenticated organization. If `cu.ID` exists, behaves like an update. Negative returned ID = conflict: -1 name, -2 external number, -3 unique ID, -4 GUID.
Updates an existing customer. `cu.ID` must be a valid existing customer ID.
Filtered search. Populate any subset of Customer fields as the filter.
Returns all branches for the authenticated organization. Returns null on auth/server error.
Creates a signed, numbered document. Totals are computed server-side from Items/Payments. Check the returned Errors list before using the result.

200.description: The created document (or a document carrying Errors).

post.summary: Create a document with idempotency by ApiIdentifier
post.description: Same as CreateDocument, but if a document with the same ApiIdentifier and type already exists, the existing document is returned with error DocumentAlreadyCreated (134) instead of creating a duplicate.

post.summary: Get document by number and type
post.description: Document numbers are sequential per type, so documentType is required.
Recommended recovery path after a timed-out create call.

post.summary: Fetch an Israel Tax allocation number for a document

post.description: Creates a hosted payment page, charges a saved token, or refunds a previous charge — and optionally creates the matching document. The response is the same object enriched with results (ClearingRedirectUrl, PaymentId, DocumentNumber...).

searchParams.description: Filter object (date range, success flag, etc.).

post.summary: Register a new Invoice4U account (partners only)
post.description: Restricted endpoint: requires a partner-specific unique token issued by Invoice4U and a whitelisted server IP. Contact Invoice4U business development for onboarding.

ID.description: Numeric error code, e.g. 80 = UnauthorizedUser, 134 = DocumentAlreadyCreated.

CommonObject.description: Response envelope inherited by most objects. Server-generated — never send these fields in requests. Always check Errors before using the payload.

IsUserMail.description: true marks the copy sent to the account owner.

GenerelCustomer.description: One-off (general) customer for documents without a stored customer record.

ID.description: Existing payment ID — used for Deposits documents.

PaymentType.description: 1 CreditCard, 2 Check, 3 MoneyTransfer, 4 Cash, 5 Credit, 6 WithholdingTax, 7 Other, 8 Bit, 9 PayBox.

DateStr.description: Alternative string date when Date is not set.

CreditCardName.description: Card brand name; resolved against configured credit companies.

DocumentType.description: 1 Invoice, 2 Receipt, 3 InvoiceReceipt, 4 InvoiceCredit, 5 ProformaInvoice, 6 InvoiceOrder, 7 InvoiceQuote, 8 InvoiceShip, 9 Deposits, 10 SupplierInvoiceToInventory, 13 PurchaseOrder.

ClientID.description: Existing customer ID. Required unless GeneralCustomer is supplied or the type doesn't need a customer.

Invoices.description: Referenced documents (each with ID and ReceiptAmount). Requires DocumentReffType.

IssueDate.description: Defaults to today. Not in the future; not before your latest document of the type.

BranchID.description: Defaults to the organization's default branch.

AutoFixPaymentsMismatchItems.description: Auto-fix ±0.01 rounding gaps between payments and items.

ID.description: 0/omitted on create; required on update. Negative values are conflict codes: -1 name, -2 external number, -3 unique ID, -4 GUID.

ExtNumber.description: Your external customer number. Unique per organization.

PayTerms.description: Payment terms in days (0 = due now, 30 = EOM+30, ...).

Guid.description: Your external GUID. Unique per organization.

OrderIdClientUsage.description: Your order reference, echoed in callbacks.

IsAutoCreateCustomer.description: Find-or-create a customer record by phone/email.

IsGeneralClient.description: Issue the document to a general customer. Default true.

IsDocCreate.description: Create a document after a successful charge.

IsManualDocCreationsWithParams.description: Provide explicit items via pipe-separated DocItem* fields.

DocItemName.description: Pipe-separated item names, e.g. "Item A|Item B".

AddToken.description: Save a card token without charging.

AddTokenAndCharge.description: Save a token and charge Sum.

PaymentId.description: Provider payment reference; response field for hosted pages, request field for refunds.

IsStandingOrderClearance.description: Set up a recurring monthly charge.

StandingOrderDuration.description: Number of monthly charges. Required for standing orders.

ClearingRedirectUrl.description: Hosted payment page URL — redirect the customer here.

PaymentId.description: Provider payment reference — use for refunds.

TransactionType.description: 1 Charge, 2 Credit, 3 PaymentInNumbers, 4 PaymentWithFees, 5 TokenCreation, 6 TokenAndCharge, 7 ChargeByToken.

OrganizationUniqueId.description: Business VAT/company number. Must be unique.

ApiKey.description: Pre-provisioned API key for the new account.
